biography.summary: Dr. J. Krishnaiah is an Associate Professor in the Department of Mechanical Engineering at IIITDM Kurnool. His research focuses on advanced manufacturing processes, materials characterization, and computational mechanics.
biography.details: He received his Ph.D. from IIT Karaghpur and has extensive experience in research and teaching. He has published several papers in reputed international journals and conferences.

research.title: Advanced Manufacturing
research.description: Research on additive manufacturing, CNC machining, and precision engineering processes.

research.title: Materials Characterization
research.description: Study of mechanical properties, microstructure, and failure analysis of engineering materials.

research.title: Computational Mechanics
research.description: Finite element analysis, simulation of manufacturing processes, and structural optimization.

experience.organization: Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing, Kurnool
experience.description: Teaching and Research in Mechanical Engineering.

Application of Computational Intelligence, Datamining concepts to solve problems encounter in Power plant operations and to improve overall performance by applying sensitivity analysis based on Artificial Neural Networks models.Development of Sensitivity Analysis tool to work on PMML neuro models. Understanding dynamics of boiler for various operating conditions through building mathematical models and as well as data-driven models.

Software and System level development: Developing Medical Imaging System for Cell imaging and Image Analyzer to score severity of cancer. Developing Software for Automated Staining System (a robotic instrument to perform set of operations for cancer detection assays)

Worked on Web Analytics and Fraud Management solutions including: End-2-End Web Analytics Service Framework. Scorecard development framework using Neural Networks and Bayesian networks. A solution for Market Basket Analysis and its applications. Developed a Fuzzy String Matching Algorithm. A Study on Anti-Money Laudering solutioning in various Financial Industries.

Research and Development on applications of Artificial Intelligence for Internet Security related to Anti-phishing, Anti-Malware. Developed a Image search concept Implemented a Proof of Concept to incorporate into Anti-Phishing core-engine.

Conceptualized and Developed a Hand-Written Character Recognition System (for Sankrit and Prakrit Languages) using Neural Networks and Image Processing concepts.  -- Lead a team of 6 -- Total end-to-end flow was designed and developed -- Ability to display both image and recognized text side-by-side for traceability and quality check. -- Build system that was able to recognize characters above 90% accuracy.

Received funding award for conducting Research in the area of Complex Engineered Systems under the scheme of Fast Track proposals for Young Scientists -2001 from SERC-DST, Govt of India during the period of 2002-2004. The research work was carried out at IIT, Kharagpur. Project title: Development of Hybrid Computational Intelligent Systems for Modelling, Controlling and Optimization of Complex Systems.

education.degree: Ph.D., Computational Intelligence and Chaos Theory
education.description: Thesis Title: Studies on Modelling of Real-World Chaotic Systems using Computational Intelligence Approach
Thesis Title: Development of Online Learning Neuro-Controller for Robot Trajectory Tracking
Project Work: COMPACT— Computerized Project Planning and Control System
